agribalyse.name_fr: Muesli floconneux ou de type traditionnel
Muesli floconneux ou de type traditionnel

ingredients_text: Oats (58%), Mixed Seeds (18%) [Sunflower Seeds, Pumpkin Seeds, Chia (Salvia Hispanica) Seeds, Linseed], Dried Fruits (13%) [Sultanas, Goji Berries, Freeze Dried Raspberry Pieces], Barley Flakes (12%). A May also contain nuts, soya, milk and eggs.
